name: Double Smash Burger
description: Two smashed beef patties, cheddar cheese, lettuce, tomato, and our special sauce on a toasted bun.

name: Wagyu Beef Burger
description: Juicy wagyu beef patty, caramelized onions, blue cheese, and arugula on a brioche bun.

name: Classic Burger
description: A timeless favorite with a juicy beef patty, lettuce, tomato, pickles, and our signature sauce on a sesame seed bun.

name: Chicken Burger
description: Grilled chicken breast, lettuce, tomato, and mayo on a soft bun for a lighter option.

name: American Cheeseburger
description: A classic with a juicy beef patty, melted American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and our signature sauce on a sesame seed bun.

name: BBQ Bacon Burger
description: A smoky delight with a beef patty, crispy bacon, BBQ sauce, cheddar cheese, lettuce, and tomato on a sesame seed bun.

name: Spicy Jalapeño Burger
description: A fiery option with a spicy jalapeño slice, lettuce, tomato, and our signature sauce on a sesame seed bun.

name: Double Stacked Burger
description: Two beef patties, melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, and our signature sauce on a sesame seed bun.
